title: Language Change  - Tab when the internet is off
scenario: When offline, tapping the Language tab shows a greyed-out state and displays an "internet required" dialog that dismisses back to the greyed-out state.
steps: Turn off internet connection on the device.
Tap the 'Ok got it' button on the dialog.
expected: The Language tab text is greyed out. Tapping inside the tab shows a dialog: "Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature." with an "Ok got it" button. Tapping the button closes the dialog and returns to the greyed-out state.
